chapter_title.en: Chapter on Endowments, Charity, and Gifts

text: 5591 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ أَبَانٍ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ اَلْجُعْفِيِّ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ تَصَدَّقَ بِصَدَقَةٍ فَرَدَّهَا عَلَيْهِ اَلْمِيرَاثُ فَهِيَ لَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5591 - Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Aban, who narrated from Isma'il Al-Ju'fi, who said: Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), said:
"Whoever gives a charity and it is returned to him through inheritance, then it belongs to him."
